name: Progression (平民逆袭)
logic_steps: Mandatory Execution: Show a pathetic 'Level 1' character getting bullied or failing.
The character discovers a secret item, hidden path, or merges to instantly evolve.
Final scene shows them as a 'Level 99 Boss' obliterating what bullied them initially.
Subtitles focus on 'Secret trick they don't want you to know'.
